headline: BridgeBio announces positive Phase 3 PROPEL 3 topline results for oral infigratinib in achondroplasia
summary: The trial met its primary endpoint with a +2.10 cm/year gain in annualized height velocity versus placebo at Week 52, showing favorable safety with no drug-related discontinuations.

headline: Chemomab reports topline results from CM-101 Phase 2 SPRING trial in PSC
summary: CM-101 met the primary endpoint with a favorable safety profile and dose-dependent improvements in disease-related biomarkers.

headline: Pfizer Announces Positive Results from Phase 3 Hemophilia A Study
summary: The Phase 3 AFFINE study achieved non-inferiority and superiority in reducing annualized bleeding rate compared to routine Factor VIII prophylaxis, with a 98.3% reduction in treated annualized bleeding rate.

headline: BriaCell's Phase 3 Patient Enrollment on Track for 1H2026 Topline Data Readout
summary: Over 160 patients enrolled in the pivotal Phase 3 study with topline interim data expected in 1H2026, assessing overall survival as the primary endpoint.

headline: UCB and Biogen Announce Positive Topline Results From Phase 3 Study of Dapirolizumab Pegol in Systemic Lupus Erythematosus
summary: The Phase 3 PHOENYCS GO study showed positive results with improvement of moderate-to-severe disease activity at Week 48 using BICLA as the primary efficacy endpoint.

headline: Lynk Pharmaceuticals Announces Positive Phase III Topline Data of Zemprocitinib in Moderate-to-Severe Atopic Dermatitis
summary: The study met all co-primary and key secondary endpoints with both dose groups demonstrating statistically significant improvements versus placebo (p < 0.0001) and a favorable safety profile.

headline: IO Biotech presents topline results from Phase 3 IOB-013 trial in advanced melanoma at ESMO, narrowly missing PFS primary endpoint.
summary: Topline data showed improvements in PFS across overall population and subgroups but narrowly missed statistical significance on primary PFS endpoint.

headline: Viridian Therapeutics announces positive topline results from Phase 3 THRIVE-2 trial of veligrotug in chronic thyroid eye disease.
summary: Viridian announced positive topline results from the Phase 3 THRIVE-2 clinical trial in patients with chronic thyroid eye disease.

headline: Capricor Therapeutics announces positive topline results from pivotal Phase 3 HOPE-3 study of deramiocel in Duchenne muscular dystrophy.
summary: Capricor announced positive topline results from the pivotal Phase 3 HOPE-3 trial evaluating deramiocel for the treatment of Duchenne muscular dystrophy.

headline: MaaT Pharma Announces Positive Topline Results from the Pivotal Phase 3 ARES Study Evaluating MaaT013 in Acute Graft-versus-Host Disease
summary: MaaT013 demonstrated 54% probability of survival at 1 year in third-line GI-aGvHD patients, with MAA submission in Europe anticipated for mid-2025.

indication: Advanced, Platinum-Resistant, High-Grade Epithelial Ovarian, Primary Peritoneal, or Fallopian-Tube Cancer
headline: Phase 3 Study Primary Completion: Relacorilant in Combination With Nab-Paclitaxel
summary: Phase 3 trial (NCT05257408) for relacorilant in combination with nab-paclitaxel reached primary completion date in March 2025.

headline: Phase 3 Study Primary Completion: Batoclimab as Induction and Maintenance Therapy
summary: Phase 3 trial (NCT05403541) for batoclimab in generalized myasthenia gravis reached primary completion date in March 2025.

headline: Phase 3 Study Primary Completion: NCX 470 vs. Latanoprost
summary: Phase 3 trial (NCT04630808) evaluating NCX 470 versus latanoprost reached primary completion date in March 2025.

headline: Phase 3 Study Primary Completion: Oral NMRA-335140 in Major Depressive Disorder
summary: Phase 3 trial (NCT06058039) for oral NMRA-335140 in major depressive disorder reached primary completion date in March 2025.

headline: IO Biotech Presents Phase 3 Results for Cylembio plus KEYTRUDA (pembrolizumab) in First-line Advanced Melanoma
summary: Cylembio plus pembrolizumab achieved 19.4 months median progression-free survival versus 11.0 months with pembrolizumab alone, narrowly missing the primary endpoint for statistical significance (p=0.0558 vs. prespecified p≤0.045).

headline: Phase 3, Randomized, Placebo-Controlled Study of Tinlarebant to Explore Safety and Efficacy in Adolescent Stargardt Disease
summary: Phase 3 trial with primary completion date of August 1, 2025 for tinlarebant in adolescent Stargardt disease.

headline: Phase 3 Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of Pegozafermin in Subjects With Severe Hypertriglyceridemia
summary: Phase 3 trial with primary completion date of August 1, 2025 for pegozafermin in severe hypertriglyceridemia.

headline: Efficacy & Safety of Olvi-Vec and Platinum-doublet + Bevacizumab Compared to Physician's Choice of Chemotherapy and Bevacizumab in Platinum-Resistant/Refractory Ovarian Cancer (OnPrime, GOG-3076)
summary: Phase 3 trial (OnPrime, GOG-3076) with primary completion date of August 1, 2025 for Olvi-Vec in platinum-resistant/refractory ovarian cancer.

headline: A Randomized Study of XEN1101 Versus Placebo in Focal-Onset Seizures (X-TOLE3)
summary: Phase 3 trial (X-TOLE3) with primary completion date of August 1, 2025 for XEN1101 in focal-onset seizures.

headline: IO Biotech Reports Topline Data from Phase 3 IOB-013 Trial in Advanced Melanoma
summary: Phase 3 trial narrowly missed statistical significance on PFS primary endpoint but showed improvements in PFS across overall population and subgroups.

headline: Medicus Pharma Reports Positive Phase 2 SKNJCT-003 Topline Data
summary: Phase 2 trial achieved 73% clinical clearance and 40% histological clearance at Day 57 in the 200μg cohort.

headline: Capricor Therapeutics Announces Positive Topline Results from Pivotal Phase 3 HOPE-3 Study
summary: Pivotal Phase 3 HOPE-3 study met its objectives with positive topline results.

headline: Galapagos announces Phase 3 DIVERSITY study topline results in Crohn's disease
summary: Phase 3 DIVERSITY study in Crohn's disease did not meet primary endpoint, leading to decision not to submit Marketing Authorization Application in Europe.

headline: I-Mab announces positive Phase 3 topline results for eftansomatropin alfa
summary: Phase 3 pivotal study met primary endpoint of annualized height velocity at week 52 and demonstrated non-inferiority to Norditropin.

headline: BioMarin releases Phase 3 data for valoctocogene roxaparvovec in hemophilia A
summary: Phase 3 data expected in early 2023 to support FDA approval for hemophilia A gene therapy.

headline: MaaT Pharma focuses resources on delivery of Phase 3 topline results for MaaT013 in aGvHD expected in mid-Q4 2024
summary: Company published half-year 2024 results, prioritizing resources for Phase 3 topline results of MaaT013 in aGvHD expected mid-Q4 2024, with positive early access program data showing 63% GI-ORR at D28.[1]

headline: MBX Biosciences announces positive topline results from Phase 2 Avail trial of once-weekly canvuparatide
summary: Once-weekly canvuparatide achieved the primary endpoint with statistical significance at Week 12 and showed positive 6-month results in the open-label extension.

headline: Soligenix announces positive Data Monitoring Committee review for confirmatory Phase 3 FLASH2 study of HyBryte
summary: The DMC confirmed no safety concerns and an acceptable safety profile consistent with prior studies, with topline results expected in the second half of 2026.

headline: FDA approves Cytokinetics' Myqorzo for heart condition
summary: The FDA approved Myqorzo, marking Cytokinetics' first product approval after 27 years in business.

headline: FDA approves Omeros' Yartemlea for rare transplant complication
summary: The FDA greenlit Yartemlea, providing a new treatment for a rare transplant complication.

headline: Spero Therapeutics reports Phase 3 trial of tebipenem HBr meets primary endpoint and stops early for efficacy
summary: The Phase 3 trial met its primary endpoint in treating cUTIs and was stopped early due to efficacy, leading to an NDA resubmission by GSK.

headline: FDA rejects Regenxbio's RGX-121 gene therapy citing lack of placebo-controlled arm
summary: FDA issued a complete response letter rejecting approval of RGX-121 for Hunter syndrome due to absence of placebo control despite prior agreement on study protocol.[1]

headline: FDA issues complete response letter for Rocket's Kresladi gene therapy
summary: FDA rejected Rocket's BLA for Kresladi after extending review, requesting additional chemistry, manufacturing, and controls information.[2][4]

headline: FDA issues CRL to Zealand Pharma for glepaglutide citing insufficient efficacy evidence
summary: FDA rejected glepaglutide application due to uncertainties in efficacy data and inconsistencies in protocol adjustments for short bowel syndrome.[3][4]

indication: follicular lymphoma and diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
headline: FDA rejects Regeneron's odronextamab BLA over confirmatory trial timelines
summary: FDA issued CRL for odronextamab citing insufficient assurance of timely completion of confirmatory trials in lymphoma patients.[3]

headline: FDA rejects Stealth BioTherapeutics' elamipretide for Barth syndrome
summary: FDA issued a complete response letter rejecting elamipretide approval for the ultra-rare Barth syndrome.[4]

indication: Epstein-Barr Virus Positive Post-Transplant Lymphoproliferative Disease
headline: FDA issues Complete Response Letter for Tabelecleucel
summary: FDA issued a Complete Response Letter for tabelecleucel in Epstein-Barr Virus Positive Post-Transplant Lymphoproliferative Disease.[6]

headline: FDA issues Complete Response Letter for Rivoceranib/Camrelizumab
summary: FDA issued a Complete Response Letter for rivoceranib/camrelizumab in unresectable or metastatic hepatocellular carcinoma.[6]

headline: FDA rejects RGX-121 gene therapy citing lack of placebo-controlled arm
summary: FDA rejected RGX-121 for Hunter syndrome due to lack of placebo-controlled arm despite prior agreement on study protocol.[2]

headline: FDA rejects bitopertin despite National Priority Voucher
summary: FDA rejected bitopertin for erythropoietic protoporphyria, issuing a complete response letter despite a Commissioner's National Priority Voucher.[2]

headline: FDA issues complete response letter for pulotine
summary: FDA issued a complete response letter for pulotine in acrogali, requiring more data before approval.[3]

headline: ivonescimab received first regulatory approval in China, cutting risk of lung cancer progression in half compared to Keytruda
summary: Ivonescimab beat Merck's Keytruda in Phase 3 trial and received China approval, though interim survival analysis showed no statistically significant difference between groups.

headline: Wave revealed positive proof-of-mechanism data marking first-ever clinical demonstration of RNA editing in humans
summary: Two AATD patients treated with single dose produced significant protein amounts with effects lasting through two months of follow-up and no serious side effects.

headline: First patient dosed in pivotal phase 3 HAELO clinical trial for CRISPR/Cas9-based gene-editing therapy
summary: NTLA-2002 is a systemically delivered single-dose CRISPR gene-editing therapy with longer-term data from phase 1/2 study expected later in 2025.

headline: First patient dosed in early phase 1 trial for in vivo BCMA-directed CAR-T therapy, first time treating patient with in vivo BCMA-directed CAR-T in clinical trial
summary: ESO-T01 is an in vivo CAR-T therapy designed to reprogram patients' T-cells within their body with initial clinical data expected in second half of 2025.

headline: First patient dosed in phase 1 clinical trial evaluating allogeneic CAR-engineered gamma delta T-cell therapy for autoimmune diseases
summary: ADI-100 is an investigational allogeneic CAR-engineered gamma delta T-cell therapy with initial data from lupus nephritis patients expected in first half of 2025.

headline: UniQure announces positive trial results leading to stock surge over 350%
summary: UniQure's stock soared over 350% following positive clinical trial results for an undisclosed drug.[1]

headline: Praxis Precision Medicines announces favorable drug trial data
summary: Praxis Precision Medicines experienced a stock increase of over 230% after announcing favorable drug trial data.[1]

headline: MBX Biosciences reports positive topline results ahead of Phase 2 readout for Canvuparatide
summary: MBX Biosciences reported gains of over 100% following positive Phase 2 topline results for Canvuparatide, a once-weekly therapy for chronic hypoparathyroidism.[1]

headline: Wave Life Sciences reveals positive proof-of-mechanism data from Phase 1b/2a study in AATD
summary: Wave Life Sciences announced positive proof-of-mechanism data from a Phase 1b/2a study in patients with alpha-1 antitrypsin deficiency, demonstrating the first clinical demonstration of RNA editing in humans.[1]

headline: Viking Therapeutics reports fantastic phase 2 results for VK2735 obesity drug
summary: Viking Therapeutics announced fantastic data from phase 2 trials of VK2735, causing the stock to jump 121% in one session and gain 116% for the year.[2]

headline: Gilead's Trodelvy failed to meet statistical significance in phase 3 lung cancer trial ahead of ASCO 2024
summary: Trodelvy failed to achieve statistical significance as primary endpoint in phase 3 trial for lung cancer.[1]

headline: Tagrisso succeeds in phase 3 lung cancer trial with 84% reduction in disease progression risk at ASCO 2024
summary: Tagrisso cut the risk of disease progression by 84% compared to placebo in phase 3 lung cancer trial.[1]

headline: Pfizer's phase 3 Lorbrena study shows positive results leading to U.S. approval presented at ASCO 2024
summary: Pfizer's phase 3 study of Lorbrena demonstrated positive results and was approved by the U.S. FDA.[1]

headline: Phase 3 E3F05 trial shows temozolomide plus radiation improves 10-year survival to 70% in grade 2 glioma
summary: Combining temozolomide with radiation resulted in a 10-year survival rate of 70% versus 47% for radiation alone.[3]

headline: Phase 3 trial of pembrolizumab shows long-term benefits in recurrence-free survival at ESMO 2024
summary: Five-year follow-up showed significantly improved recurrence-free survival, distant metastasis-free survival, and overall outcomes with pembrolizumab versus placebo.[2]

indication: FGFR2b-positive first-line gastric or gastroesophageal junction cancer
headline: Amgen announces positive topline Phase 3 results for bemarituzumab in FGFR2b-positive first-line gastric cancer
summary: Bemarituzumab plus chemotherapy met the primary endpoint of overall survival at interim analysis, showing statistically significant improvement over chemotherapy alone in patients with FGFR2b overexpression.

headline: Eli Lilly announces positive results from Phase 3 LIBRETTO-432 trial for Retevmo
summary: Retevmo delivered highly statistically significant results in the Phase 3 LIBRETTO-432 trial.

headline: Mineralys announces pivotal phase III Launch-HTN study meets primary efficacy endpoints
summary: The phase III Launch-HTN and phase II Advance-HTN studies of lorundrostat met primary efficacy endpoints with statistical significance and favorable safety in hypertension patients.[1]

headline: Mineralys reports positive top-line data from phase II Explore-CKD study
summary: Phase II Explore-CKD study showed lorundrostat added to SGLT2 inhibitor significantly improved outcomes in hypertensive patients with CKD.[1]

headline: FDA approves Insmed's Brinsupri as first treatment for non-CF bronchiectasis
summary: FDA approved Brinsupri (brensocatib) as the first treatment for non-CF bronchiectasis in August 2025, with subsequent European approval.[1]

headline: Structure Therapeutics announces positive top-line data from ACCESS clinical program
summary: Positive top-line data from the ACCESS clinical program of investigational GLP-1 candidate aleniglipron for obesity treatment announced in December 2025.[2]

headline: Minerva Neurosciences secures funding to advance roluperidone through Phase III trial and NDA resubmission
summary: Shares skyrocketed 140% after securing up to $200 million to advance roluperidone through Phase III confirmatory trial and FDA NDA resubmission.[4]

headline: MoonLake announces Phase 3 VELA-2 trial fails primary endpoint for sonelokimab in HS
summary: VELA-2 trial failed primary endpoint at Week 16; efficacy inferior to competitor BIMZELX, causing 90% stock crash.

headline: Quince Therapeutics Phase 3 NEAT trial of eDSP fails primary endpoint
summary: Pivotal NEAT trial missed primary endpoint (p=0.0851) and key secondary endpoint, crashing stock 91%.

headline: Cassava Sciences reports second Phase 3 failure for Simufilam in Alzheimer’s
summary: Second consecutive Phase 3 trial showed no impact on disease progression, leading to program termination and 20% stock drop.

headline: Ultragenyx late-stage studies of Setrusumab fail to reduce fracture rates
summary: Two late-stage trials failed primary endpoint of significant fracture rate reduction, dropping stock 43%.

headline: FDA issues second CRL for ONS-5010 BLA due to efficacy failure
summary: NORSE EIGHT confirmatory study failed non-inferiority endpoint at week 8, causing 54% stock plunge.
